title: audit — trait composition
description: This module ships ZERO owned traits. Capture is exclusively via the vendor `owen-it/laravel-auditing` package's `Auditable` trait — modules opt in to auditing by composing THAT trait on their Eloquent models. This module OWNS the storage adaptation + read surface + retention + export around the vendor's `audits` table; it does NOT introduce a parallel capture trait.

framework.reason: AuditRetentionPolicy only. Audit rows are hard-purged at retention boundary; no soft-delete on the immutable ledger.

foundation.consumed_by: AuditRetentionPolicy — the policy itself is audited (SELF-audit). Every policy CRUD writes an audit row via the vendor Auditable trait on the policy model.
foundation.note: Wraps `OwenIt\Auditing\Auditable` + adds our tenant_id column enforcement. Applied to policy rows but NOT to Audit rows themselves (audit rows don't audit themselves — that would recurse infinitely).

tenancy.reason: Every entity carries tenant_id. Applied via global scope + auto-fill on save. Order matters: BelongsToTenant MUST come first among tenancy-related traits — our Audit model wraps the vendor Audit model and composes BelongsToTenant to enforce tenant scoping on reads.

vendor.consumed_by: AuditRetentionPolicy (self-audit via HasAuditable) + every DOMAIN model across every module (each module composes this trait onto its Eloquent models — the audit CAPTURE contract). This module does NOT declare which models compose the trait; that's per-domain-module decision.
vendor.capture_note: The trait's `AuditableObserver` fires on save/delete/restore/custom-transition. Wave-6 default events: created / updated / deleted / restored. Custom events register via Auditable::registerAuditableTransition at boot.

audit.notes: NO HasUlids — primary key stays vendor's bigint auto-increment. NO HasUserstamps — the vendor's user_type + user_id polymorphic actor is the equivalent. NO HasAuditable — audit rows do not audit themselves (recursion). NO SoftDeletes — hard-purge at retention boundary. NO HasMetadata — the vendor's tags + old_values/new_values already serve as metadata.

audit_retention_policy.notes: Full trait composition — the policy itself IS audited (writes audit rows via HasAuditable wrapping the vendor Auditable trait). SoftDeletes preserves the historical policy trail for compliance.

audit_export.notes: AuditExport metadata (async export request) — audited (the request-for-export is itself a compliance-relevant event). No SoftDeletes — hard-purge at 90d retention.
